follow.blockedMessage: This creator is unavailable due to a DMCA takedown. See our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> for more details.

recordings.liveAgo_context: For live streams showing when recording started. Shows 'started recording 15 minutes ago'
recordings.recordedAgo_context: For recorded streams showing when recording was made. Shows 'recorded 3 days ago'

deleteConfirm.title: Delete video
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this video? This action cannot be undone.

recordings.videoLimitMessage: You've reached your free video limit.
recordings.downloadEmailSent: Download link on its way to your email
recordings.downloadFeatureMessage: Downloading videos is a premium feature.

resetCountersConfirm.title: Reset view & download counters
resetCountersConfirm.message: This will reset views and downloads to 0 for this recording. The history of who viewed/downloaded is preserved in tracking data. Continue?

followers.addedAgo_context: For when a creator was added to user's list. Shows 'Added 3 days ago'
followers.upgradeModalHeadline: Never miss a live stream again
followers.max3Message: You've reached the 3 creator limit on the free plan.
followers.max50Message: You've reached your limit of 50 creators on this plan.
followers.max100Message: You've reached your limit of 100 creators on this plan.
followers.unfollowUpgradeTitle: Manage your creators freely with premium

expired.title: Your Premium Plan Has Ended
expired.subtitle: Your creators are no longer being recorded. Renew now to pick up right where you left off — all your creators and settings are still saved.
expired.loseTitle: If you downgrade you will permanently lose:
expired.loseCreators: All your followed creators and recordings

freemiusShutdown.title: Your Freemius payment is being refunded
freemiusShutdown.subtitle: Re-subscribe via Stripe in 30 seconds to keep your premium features.
freemiusShutdown.body:
Freemius — one of my payment providers — has terminated their relationship with me. They're refunding every payment they ever processed for me, including yours. Whatever you paid me through Freemius is being returned to you. You've effectively had premium for free up to now.

This has been a hard hit on me, but my concern right now is you. You've built up your creators, your recordings, your clips here — I don't want you to lose any of it.

Stripe has always been my other payment option and it remains fully available. Re-subscribing through it takes 30 seconds. Same plan, same price, no setup, no interruption.
freemiusShutdown.loseTitle: If you downgrade you will permanently lose:
freemiusShutdown.loseCreators: All your followed creators and recordings
freemiusShutdown.contact: Questions? Email <email>contact@livestreamrecorder.com</email> or contact Freemius about your refund.

videoPlayer.hevcUnsupportedTitle: Your browser can't play this video
videoPlayer.hevcUnsupportedMessage: This TikTok recording uses HEVC (H.265). Your browser doesn't support it. Try Safari, Edge on Windows, or install the HEVC Video Extensions from the Microsoft Store.
videoPlayer.audioCodecUnsupportedTitle: Your browser can't play this video's audio
videoPlayer.audioCodecUnsupportedMessage: This recording uses HE-AACv2 audio, which your browser doesn't fully support. Try Chrome or Edge on desktop, or use Safari on Mac/iOS.
videoPlayer.playbackFailedMessage: Something went wrong playing this video. Open the browser console (F12) and share what's logged with support so we can fix it.
